patches.summary: Tenure commands now compute contiguous splash-run length instead of all-time MIN/MAX.
patches.reason: A story demoted from splash and later re-promoted previously reported gross MAX-MIN tenure, overstating duration. Both `tenure` and `tenure --history` now compute the active (or longest) contiguous splash run per story_id using a gap-and-island SQL pattern.

patches.summary: `tail` replaces per-row story lookup with a single JOIN.
patches.reason: Each slot_event row triggered a separate SELECT for title/url, becoming O(N) extra queries as snapshot history grew. Joining `drudge_slot_event` to `drudge_story` on (story_id, snapshot_id) returns the title/url at the time of the event in one query and is semantically more accurate than the previous "most recent row" lookup.

patches.summary: `on-date` returns exit 3 (not found) instead of exit 4 (auth) when the local store is empty.
patches.reason: Exit code 4 is the framework's auth-error code; using it for the missing-data case made shell scripts that branch on exit code conflate "please sync" with "your credentials are bad." Exit 3 = not-found is conventional and accurate.

patches.summary: `splash` computes tenure from first SPLASH appearance (contiguous run), not first appearance in any slot.
patches.reason: splashTenureSeconds queried MIN(captured_at) without a slot filter, inflating tenure for stories promoted to splash from columns. Applied the same contiguous-run pattern used in tenure.go: smallest splash captured_at strictly after the most recent non-splash row.

patches.summary: `digest`'s biggest-red-surges section reports a real total_tenure_seconds (story lifetime) instead of duplicating red_tenure_seconds.
patches.reason: queryDigestRedSurges set total_tenure_seconds to redTenureSeconds, making the two fields identical. Added a per-story MIN/MAX(captured_at) query against drudge_story so total_tenure_seconds reflects the full lifetime on Drudge regardless of color.
